summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals (BZA) resumed its meeting to address zoning cases. BZA-2022-014 was continued to the August 15th meeting. BZA-2022-015, an appeal for 6765 Goshen Road involving a behavioral health and recovery center (Three Waters Recovery), was discussed extensively, including whether the facility constitutes a hospital or a medical/dental clinic under zoning definitions. The appeal was granted unanimously.
decisions: BZA-2022-014 variance request continued to August 15th meeting
BZA-2022-015 appeal for 6765 Goshen Road granted (passed 3-0: Curie yes, Siegler yes, Theodore yes)
action_items: Next BZA meeting scheduled for July 18th
Consider barrier/screening for neighboring residential property per John Rose's request
notable_topics: Appeal for 6765 Goshen Road (BZA-2022-015) regarding Three Waters Recovery behavioral health and recovery center
Zoning definition debate: hospital vs. medical/dental office and clinic classification
Parking space sufficiency for the facility
Neighbor concern about behavioral health center proximity to residential property with children
Ohio Revised Code Section 3701.07 hospital definition discussion
attendees: Jeff Corcoran (applicant representative, 6177 State Route 132, Goshen)
Marcia Silcott (nurse practitioner at Three Waters Recovery, Winchester, Ohio)
Shirley Bacon (clinical nurse specialist at Three Waters Recovery)
notes: Transcript heavily degraded with repeated automated text artifacts ('Board of Trustees Meeting' headers, garbled text). The meeting was a Board of Zoning Appeals hearing, not a regular Board of Trustees meeting. The BZA resumed at 9:49 after a recording break. Public comment opened at 10:12 and closed at 10:16. Jeff Corcoran explained the application was a tenant change, not a new business request. Neighbor John Rose expressed concern but did not oppose approval, requesting only a visual barrier. Shirley Bacon, a 41-year hospital nurse, testified that Three Waters Recovery is not comparable to a hospital.
title: BZA 62322 2 of 2
